race.name: Ushuaia Loppet
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers at the bottom of the world — the most southern ski race on Earth, where Tierra del Fuego's sub-Antarctic winds test every stride.

climate.description: August is mid-winter in the Southern Hemisphere. Ushuaia's sub-Antarctic climate delivers cold, wet, and windy conditions. Typically -5°C to 2°C. Snow reliability can be inconsistent — Tierra del Fuego's maritime influence brings rain-snow transitions. Fierce Patagonian winds are the defining challenge.
challenges: Fierce Patagonian winds — gusts can exceed 80 km/h
Maritime influence means rain-snow transitions possible
Limited daylight in August at 55°S latitude
Remote location with limited winter infrastructure

course.primary: A 42km classic race through the forests and valleys surrounding Ushuaia, the world's southernmost city. The course traverses Tierra del Fuego's distinctive sub-Antarctic landscape — lenga beech forests, frozen valleys, and mountain views with the Beagle Channel in the distance. The terrain is rolling with moderate climbs through forested sections. Wind exposure on open stretches is the defining course challenge.
course.surface: Groomed classic tracks through sub-Antarctic terrain; conditions variable
course.grooming: Basic to moderate — limited grooming equipment in remote Patagonian location
features: World's most southern ski race at 55°S
Views toward the Beagle Channel and Chilean islands
August race date — Southern Hemisphere winter
Tierra del Fuego's unique end-of-the-world atmosphere
Race at the literal 'End of the World'

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum scenery score for the extraordinary sub-Antarctic setting. Strong international draw as a bucket-list destination. Snow reliability is the key weakness — maritime climate at low altitude means inconsistent conditions. Worldloppet membership currently SUSPENDED. The remoteness is both the appeal and the logistical limitation.

history.summary: Founded in 1986, the Ushuaia Loppet holds the distinction of being the world's most southern ski race, set in Tierra del Fuego at the southern tip of Argentina. The race was a Worldloppet member, though membership is currently suspended. Racing in August during the Southern Hemisphere winter, it offers a unique counter-seasonal option for Northern Hemisphere skiers. The race traverses the sub-Antarctic landscapes around Ushuaia, a city that brands itself as 'El Fin del Mundo' — the End of the World.
notable_facts: World's most southern ski race at approximately 55°S latitude
August race date allows Northern Hemisphere skiers a summer skiing option
Ushuaia is known as 'El Fin del Mundo' — the End of the World
Tierra del Fuego means 'Land of Fire' — named by Magellan in 1520

youtube_data.search_query: Ushuaia Loppet cross country ski race Ushuaia

videos.title: Cross-country skiing at the end of the world: Ushuaia Loppet 2024
videos.description:
Here come my experiences from one of the toughest races I have ever skied. Patagonia can be quite merciless. At 2024's Ushuaialoppet we had to face a rough nature: Strong wind, rain and snow, slushy and icy tracks. But we made it! And it was totally worth it. 

Traveling to Patagonia, Ushuaia to get a stamp to your Worldloppet Passport at the end of the world is definitely something that should be on your bucket list!

videos.title: I really traveled to the End of the World to ski a marathon - Ushuaialoppet 2024 🇦🇷
videos.description:
I have never been traveling further to ski a race! This summer I booked my flights to Ushuaia - the end of the world - in Patagonia Argentina 🇦🇷 to participate in the southern most Worldloppet race, the Ushuaia Loppet. 

This was my 18th ski marathon around the globe and it was quite a tough one. Icy and slushy tracks, rain and snow mixing and storm... But we made it! 
Thanks so much to the organizers, for making things happen. 

We also had the chance to experience this extraordinary place on the touristic side: 
🌆 🏔️ City walk in Ushuaia
🌊 🛥️ Boat cruise through the beagle channel (sealions, penguins and the light tower at the end of the world)
🚂 🏔️ Train to the end of the world

Check out all info the the ski race, Ushuaialoppet: 
👉 https://www.worldloppet.com/wl-race/argentinas-greatest-ski-race-ushuaia-loppet/

#endoftheworld #ushuaiafindelmundo #ushuaia #patagonia #crosscountryskiing #skiing #travelvlog #traveling

videos.title: Ushuaialoppet Virtual Edition 2020 - Be part of Worldloppet's season opener
videos.description:
Due to COVID19 the Ushaialoppet was cancelled. But there is an alternative event: The Ushuaialoppet Virtual Edition 2020. Choose your distance and ski, rollerski or run wherever you want. Stay home, stay safe, stay together! 

How to participate: 
https://www.worldloppet.com/virtual-edition-ushuaia-loppet-participation-possible-despite-covid-19/

videos.title: Running around beautiful lakes - -Virtual Ushuaia Loppet
videos.description: The 12th virtual challenge for me is Ushuaia Loppet. The real race is held in Argentine in August. But it's mid summer in Japan. So I chose Urabandai Plateau for the virtual race. This district has many lakes made by the eruption of Mount Bandai. Enjoy beautiful colors of the lakes.

videos.title: Ushuaia Loppet - Marchablanca - Worldloppet 2018
videos.description: Resumen del evento deportivo internacional organizado por el Club Andino Ushuaia.
videos.curation_reason: Official race coverage showing course layout and race atmosphere from the organizing club.

quotes.text: Strong wind, rain and snow, slushy and icy tracks. It was storming, raining, I lost my glove, I lost my glasses but now I got everything back and we are on track. Really tough conditions but a beautiful course.
The organizers were working from 3:00 a.m. and started to put all the things together from 6:00 a.m. This time it was really hard because of the weather, but I hope everything will be fine today.

Traveling to the end of the world to the door to Antarctica is a thing for itself already, but having a chance to get a stamp in your Worldloppet passport here in Tierra Del Fuego at the end of the world is definitely a special thing.
